title: plan-submit (score-submit-plan) output data
description:
Shape of the `data` field on a successful `plan-submit --profile

--cluster ` envelope. The slash command applies the cost rubric (see docs/primitives/score-submit-plan.md) to the candidates list and picks one constraint.

canary_plan.description: When needs_canary=true, a 1-task probe spec (constraint, walltime). Null when scoring is possible.

runtime_prior_quantiles_sec.description: Per-gpu_type quantiles from runtime-prior; empty when this candidate has no priors.

p_fail_30d.description: Per-gpu_type failure probability over the last 30 days.

walltime_arbitraged_from.description: Original walltime ask in seconds before cold-start arbitrage trimmed it (the trim fits the campus user's job in backfill shadows higher-priority jobs don't reach). Null when arbitrage didn't fire (priors available, cluster opted out via walltime_arbitrage: false, or ask below the 1h floor).

daisy_chain_segments.description: Number of dependency-chained segments the task was split into so it survives the cluster's hard walltime ceiling. Null when no chaining (ask fits within max_walltime_sec - 1h queue-wait buffer, or kill switch / detection blocked the chain).

daisy_chain_dep_jobids.description: Scheduler job IDs of each prior segment as observed at submit time (segment 0 has no parent, segment 1 holds on segment 0, etc.). Always null at plan_submit time; submit_flow populates it from the actual qsub/sbatch responses.
